mapper.sql: (SELECT s.* FROM fund_score s INNER JOIN ( SELECT fund_id, MAX(score_date) AS max_date FROM fund_score GROUP BY fund_id ) m ON m.fund_id = s.fund_id AND m.max_date = s.score_date)

(SELECT pm.* FROM fund_performance_metric pm INNER JOIN ( SELECT fund_id, MAX(stat_date) AS max_date FROM fund_performance_metric WHERE period_code = '1Y' GROUP BY fund_id ) m ON m.fund_id = pm.fund_id AND m.max_date = pm.stat_date WHERE pm.period_code = '1Y')

(SELECT fund_id, string_agg(manager_name, ',' ORDER BY rn) AS manager_name FROM ( SELECT fmr.fund_id, fm.manager_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY fmr.fund_id ORDER BY fmr.is_current DESC, fmr.relation_id) AS rn FROM fund_manager_relation fmr INNER JOIN fund_manager fm ON fm.manager_id = fmr.manager_id ) ranked WHERE rn <= 2 GROUP BY fund_id)
(SELECT ftr.fund_id, string_agg(ft.tag_name, ',' ORDER BY ft.tag_id) AS tag_text FROM fund_tag_relation ftr INNER JOIN fund_tag ft ON ft.tag_id = ftr.tag_id WHERE ft.enabled = 1 GROUP BY ftr.fund_id)
mapper.select: SELECT f.fund_id, f.fund_code, f.fund_name, f.full_name, f.fund_type, f.risk_level, f.company_id, c.company_name, COALESCE(cm.manager_name, 'N/A') AS manager_name, f.fund_scale, f.establish_date, f.benchmark, f.custodian, f.status, f.source, f.updated_time, s.total_score, s.recommend_level, s.score_date FROM fund_info f LEFT JOIN fund_company c ON c.company_id = f.company_id LEFT JOIN cm ON cm.fund_id = f.fund_id LEFT JOIN s ON s.fund_id = f.fund_id WHERE f.fund_id = #{fundId} AND f.status = 1

SELECT s.score_date, s.yield_score, s.risk_score, s.stability_score, s.manager_score, s.scale_score, s.total_score, s.recommend_level, s.explain_text FROM fund_score s WHERE s.fund_id = #{fundId} ORDER BY s.score_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT t.tag_id, t.tag_code, t.tag_name, t.tag_category, r.confidence, r.source, r.tag_date FROM fund_tag_relation r INNER JOIN fund_tag t ON t.tag_id = r.tag_id WHERE r.fund_id = #{fundId} AND t.enabled = 1 ORDER BY t.tag_category, t.tag_id

SELECT nav_date, unit_nav, acc_nav, daily_return FROM ( SELECT nav_date, unit_nav, acc_nav, daily_return FROM fund_nav WHERE fund_id = #{fundId} ORDER BY nav_date DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) n ORDER BY nav_date ASC

SELECT stat_date, period_code, return_rate, annual_return, volatility, max_drawdown, sharpe_ratio, rank_in_category, rank_total FROM fund_performance_metric WHERE fund_id = #{fundId} AND stat_date = ( SELECT MAX(stat_date) FROM fund_performance_metric WHERE fund_id = #{fundId} ) ORDER BY CASE period_code WHEN '1W' THEN 1 WHEN '1M' THEN 2 WHEN '3M' THEN 3 WHEN '6M' THEN 4 WHEN '1Y' THEN 5 WHEN 'YTD' THEN 6 WHEN 'SINCE' THEN 7 ELSE 99 END

SELECT announcement_id, title, announcement_date, category, source_url, summary FROM fund_announcement WHERE fund_id = #{fundId} ORDER BY announcement_date DESC NULLS LAST, announcement_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT report_id, report_date, report_type, stock_ratio, bond_ratio, cash_ratio, top10_concentration FROM fund_holding_report WHERE fund_id = #{fundId} ORDER BY report_date DESC, report_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT holding_id, security_code, security_name, security_type, industry_name, market_value, holding_ratio FROM fund_holding_detail WHERE report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY holding_ratio DESC NULLS LAST, holding_id ASC

SELECT attribution_id, report_date, period_code, allocation_effect, selection_effect, industry_effect, style_effect, attribution_summary FROM fund_attribution WHERE fund_id = #{fundId} ORDER BY report_date DESC, attribution_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
